title: Review of decision in removal proceedings
doc_html:
§1816.  Review of decision in removal proceedings

The deputy commissioner, departmental head, or employee, shall have a right of action at law to have the decision of the governing body reviewed de novo as to the law and facts.
doc_text:
§1816.  Review of decision in removal proceedings
The deputy commissioner, departmental head, or employee, shall have a right of action at law to have the decision of the governing body reviewed de novo as to the law and facts.
